dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Here is an overview of your progress.
dashboard.noCourses: No active courses at the moment.

courses.title: My Courses
courses.noCoursesSubtitle: You have no approved courses yet. Register now.

payments.title: My Payments
payments.subtitle: Track your payment status in real time.
payments.noPaymentsSubtitle: Register for a course to see your payments here.
payments.alertMessage: Please visit the accounting office to settle your balance.
payments.payOptions: To settle your tuition or exam fees, you have two options:
payments.cashOption: Cash payment at the center's office.
payments.mobileOption: Payment via Mobile Money (Moov/MTN) on the center's official numbers.
payments.keepReceipt: Please always keep your physical or digital receipt.
payments.historyAccess: Full access to your financial history

results.title: My Results
results.subtitle: View your grades and exam decisions.

planning.title: My Schedule
planning.noPlanning: No schedule available at the moment.

messaging.title: Message Center
messaging.subtitle: Start a conversation with our administrative team for any questions or assistance.
messaging.startPrompt: Send a message to start the conversation.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account preferences.
profile.securityTipDesc: Make sure your contact information is up to date to receive exam notifications and your digital certificates without delay.

security.title: Security Settings
security.saveLogsDesc: You can save your all activity logs including unusual activity detected.
security.changePasswordDesc: Set a unique password to protect your account.
security.twoFactorDesc: Secure your account with 2FA security. When it is activated you will need to enter not only your password, but also a special code.
security.deleteAccountDesc: If you wish to delete your account, please ensure you have backed up any important data.
security.twoFactorModalDesc: Scan the QR code below with your authentication app.

hero.title: Check your exam results with
hero.subtitle: A modern and secure platform for candidates and administrators of the Spass mit Deutsch center in Benin.

howItWorks.title: How it works?
howItWorks.step1Desc: Use your candidate number and unique code to access your personal space.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Instant access to your grade details by module and your final result.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Print or download your official transcript in PDF format in one click.

features.title: Why our platform?
features.subtitle: Designed to offer the best possible experience for students and administrators.
features.card1Desc: Find your results in seconds without a complex account.
features.card2Desc: Your data is protected and accessible only with your credentials.
features.card3Desc: An interface optimized for fluid consultation on smartphone and tablet.
features.card4Desc: Administrators benefit from a powerful tool for entry and publication.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How to get my consultation code?
faq.a1: Your code is sent to you by email or SMS when you register for the exam session.
faq.a2: Yes, the grades published here correspond to the official deliberations of the center.
faq.a3: Absolutely. A 'Download PDF' button allows you to get a printable version.

footer.description: The reference center for learning German in Benin. Excellence, rigor, and success.
footer.rights: © 2026 Spass mit Deutsch Benin. All rights reserved.

dashboard.welcomeAdmin: Here is what's happening in your center today.
dashboard.helpGuidesDesc: Check our interactive guides to learn how to manage sessions, enrollments, and payments with peace of mind.
dashboard.errorFillName: Fill in first and last name

sessions.title: Exam Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Manage exam periods and results publication.
sessions.noSessionsFound: No sessions found in the database.
sessions.publishConfirm: Are you sure you want to publish the results? This will send an email to all candidates of this session.
sessions.publishingInProgress: Publication and email sending in progress...

help.title: Admin Help Center
help.subtitle: Comprehensive guides to master your exam management platform.

presentation.title: Platform Overview
presentation.desc: The Spass mit Deutsch Benin administration interface was designed to automate critical processes: registrations, payments, grade entry, and communication.
presentation.objectiveDesc: Simplify the lifecycle of a session, from registration to digital distribution of results.
presentation.securityDesc: A permanent audit log records every sensitive modification to prevent any human error.

secretary.title: Secretariat Guide
secretary.sessionsDesc: The session is the heart of the organization. Define the target level as it determines the grade modules.
secretary.modeIndividualDesc: For late registrations via the quick add form.
secretary.modeImportDesc: Save time by importing complete lists via our template files.
secretary.credentialsDesc: The system automatically generates a registration number and code. Use the mass send tool to transmit these accesses by email.
secretary.resultsDesc: Grades remain in 'Draft' until official publication which opens access to the candidate portal.

accounting.title: Accounting Guide
accounting.statusDesc: The system calculates the balance due. A partial payment will set the file to 'PARTIAL' status.
accounting.receiptsDesc: Systematically generate the PDF receipt to ensure unique numbering and traceability.
accounting.pricingDesc: Define prices by level, module, or fee category (late fees, file fees, etc.).
accounting.dashboardDesc: Consult the treasury status in real time (collected vs expected) on the admin home page.

communication.title: Messaging & Notifications
communication.chatDesc: Communicate directly with students. Search for a candidate by name to start a discussion.
communication.attachmentsDesc: Send documents or images directly via the chat interface.
communication.notificationsDesc: Administrators receive real-time alerts for new messages or pending registrations.

security.title: Audit & Control
security.auditDesc: Every action (grade modification, deletion, payment) is logged with the author, date, and details of the change.
security.rbacDesc: Rights are restricted by role: Super Admin (all), Accountant (finance), Secretary (grades/candidates).
security.twoFactorDesc: Enable 2FA in your settings to secure access to your administrative account.

footer.title: Still have questions?
footer.desc: If you encounter a technical issue not listed here, contact GuelichWeb technical support via WhatsApp (+229 66 36 87 05).

auth.studentSubtitle: Log in to access your personalized dashboard, view your results and manage your profile.
auth.2faSubtitle: Enter the code generated by your authentication app.
auth.warningText: Only authorized administrators and secretaries can access this space. All login attempts are recorded.

connexion.portalSubtitle: Select your space to access your personalized tools.

studentPortal.title: Student Space
studentPortal.description: Access your courses, check your exam results and download your certificates of achievement.

teacherPortal.title: Teacher Space
teacherPortal.description: Manage your classes, follow your students' progress and enter evaluation grades.

connexion.secureSystem: © 2026 SPASS MIT DEUTSCH BENIN • SECURE SYSTEM

consultation.title: Check my results
consultation.searchSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your grades.
consultation.helpItem1: Your candidate number is on your notice.
consultation.helpItem2: The consultation code was sent to you by email when results were published.
consultation.helpItem3: In case of technical issues, contact WhatsApp support (+229 66 36 87 05).
consultation.importantInfoText: These results are official and correspond to the deliberations of the Spass mit Deutsch Benin center. The PDF transcript can be downloaded and printed. For any complaint, contact the secretariat within 15 days.

register.portalSubtitle: Choose the type of registration that matches your needs to start your application.

simple.title: Course Registration
simple.subtitle: Simple enrollment form
simple.description: Join our regular German courses. Choose your level (A1 to B2), your modules and start learning at your own pace.
simple.disabledMsg: Course registrations are not available at the moment.

osd.title: ÖSD Exam Registration
osd.subtitle: Special ÖSD form
osd.description: Register for the official ÖSD exams (Österreichisches Sprachdiplom Deutsch). Internationally recognized certification.
osd.disabledMsg: ÖSD registrations are not yet open. Please check back during the exam period.

dashboard.subtitle: Here is an overview of your progress and courses.
dashboard.noActiveCourses: No active courses at the moment.

importantInfo.title: Important Information
importantInfo.osdOpenDesc: Registration for the ÖSD exam session is now open. Select the button below to choose your modules and validate your application.
importantInfo.osdClosedDesc: Registration for ÖSD exams is currently closed. Keep an eye on this section for upcoming session dates.

announcements.monthlyReportDesc: Your progress report for April is ready.
announcements.germanNightDesc: Join us Friday evening for the conversation club.

results.title: My Results & Certificates
results.subtitle: Access your official grades and download your certificates of achievement.
results.certificateDesc: Congratulations! You have successfully passed the {level} level during the {session} session. Your official certificate is available in PDF format.
results.viewDetailedDesc: To see the detail of your points by module (Lesen, Hören, Schreiben, Sprechen), use the public consultation portal.
results.futureResults: Results for ongoing sessions will be published here upon validation by the secretariat.

courses.title: Your Formations
courses.subtitle: Propel your career with a perfect mastery of German.
courses.emptyLibrary: Your library is empty. Explore our catalogue to start.
courses.chooseNextStep: Choose your next step towards mastering German.
courses.certAvailableAtEnd: Certificate available at the end of the module.
courses.registeredSuccess: Your request for {name} has been registered!
